raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Native Americans have a long history of contributions to the United States in all fields of endeavor.",
    "Mary Golda Ross, a NASA scientist and Cherokee, played a critical role in the Apollo missions.",
    "John Herrington of the Chickasaw Nation was the first Native American to walk in space in 2002.",
    "Native American men and women have served in the United States Armed Forces going back to the American Revolution.",
    "The National Native American Veterans Memorial in Washington, D.C. opened to honor contributions of Native Americans in the armed forces.",
    "California's history is deeply connected to the roots of many Native American tribes.",
    "The Kumeyaay have been a part of what is now known as San Diego County for over 12,000 years.",
    "Native Americans have made vast cultural and economic contributions to the state of California.",
    "Native American Heritage Month aims to educate the public about tribes and the unique challenges Native people face."
  ]
}
```
